disclaimer_text: Univu provides astrological readings for entertainment and informational purposes only. These readings are generated using computational models and classical rule-sets — they are NOT a substitute for professional advice. Do not make life decisions based solely on this output. Always consult a qualified astrologer, counselor, or relevant professional for personal guidance. By using this service, you acknowledge and accept these terms.
underage_message: The universe has wonderful things planned for you. Focus on your studies, be kind, follow your curiosity, and trust that your path is bright. The stars shine for you — come back when you're 18 for a full reading!
